thread_post: I spent 6 months testing which AI prompts actually make money as a freelancer. Packed them into a kit with a full Notion system. Here's what's inside:

The Prompt Library (50 prompts in 7 categories):

- 10 Blog Writing (SEO posts, case studies, listicles)
- 10 Social Media (threads, LinkedIn, captions)
- 8 Email Marketing (cold outreach, sequences)
- 7 Ad Copy & Sales (FB ads, landing pages)
- 8 SEO & Strategy
- 7 Client Comms & Ideation

All copy-paste ready.

The Notion System (7 connected databases):

- Client CRM with sales pipeline
- Project tracker
- Income dashboard
- AI tool comparison (20+ tools rated)
- Weekly planner with AI prompts linked
- Service packages with suggested pricing

Everything talks to everything.

The part nobody talks about: pricing.

The kit includes a Pricing Calculator and 10 ready-made Service Packages:

- Blog Content: $300-600/mo
- Social Media Mgmt: $400-800/mo
- Email Sequences: $200-400/project

Stop guessing. Start quoting with confidence.

Get the full AI Side Hustle Starter Kit for $19.

50 prompts. 7 databases. Works on free Notion.
